import React from 'react'; const ReportTemplate = React.forwardRef(({ student, data, heatmapData }, ref) => { if (!student) return null; const attendancePercentage = data?.summary?.attendancePercentage || data?.percentage || 0; const recentScores = data?.summary?.latestScore ? [data.summary.latestScore] : (data?.logs?.filter(l => l.score) || []); return (
{/* Header */}
S

SRS ACADEMY

Excellence in Education

Academic Progress Report

Generated on: {new Date().toLocaleDateString()}

{/* Student Info */}

Student Name

{student.name}

Roll Number

{student.rollNo || 'N/A'}

Batch / Group

{student.batch || 'Class 12 - Medical'}

Status

Active Student
{/* Main Content */}
{/* Attendance Section */}

Attendance Summary

{attendancePercentage}%

Overall Presence

Consistency Status: {attendancePercentage >= 75 ? 'Excellent' : 'Average'}

The student has maintained a steady attendance record. Regular attendance is key to mastering competitive exam concepts.

{/* Test Performance Section */}

Mock Test Performance

{recentScores.length > 0 ? recentScores.map((score, i) => ( )) : ( )}
Test Name Subject Score Percentile
{score.testName || 'Regular Quiz'} {score.subject || 'All Subjects'} {score.marks || score.score}/{score.totalMarks || 100} {Math.round(((score.marks || score.score) / (score.totalMarks || 100)) * 100)}%
No mock test records available.
{/* Footer / Signature */}

SRS Academy Official Seal

This is a system-generated report.

Director Signature

); }); export default ReportTemplate;
